title: Settings
description: Manage your household, tax assumptions and sync preferences.
languageDescription: Choose the language used across the app.

household.title: Household
household.description: Your household profile is used across the app for tax and filing defaults.
household.empty: No household found yet. It is created when your workbook is set up.
household.name: Name

tax.title: Tax assumptions ({{year}})
tax.description: Effective rates used for tax estimates. These are simple planning inputs, not tax advice.

sync.title: Sync preferences
sync.description: Control how your data syncs to your Google Sheet.
sync.autoDescription: Push local changes to your sheet as you make them.

backup.title: Backup
backup.description: Download a JSON snapshot of all your local data.

reset.title: Reset local data
reset.description: Delete all financial data stored on this device (including leftover demo data), then reload. Your Google workbook is not touched — connected data re-imports from it. You stay signed in.
reset.confirmDescription: This permanently clears the local database on this device and reloads the app. Data already synced to your Google Sheet stays safe and re-imports. This cannot be undone.
